subject: Our daughter
body:
Dear Jeffrey 
I can't thank you enough for Inttiducing me to bill I learned so much about what we can do and he already introduced me to a few therapists and doctors 
I  am so grateful for your help my friend god bless you 
Sultan 

Sent from my iPhone
